queries.question: Who produced Inception?
queries.sql: select name from Studio join Movies on Studio.studio_id=Movies.studio_id where Movies.title='Inception'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?movies p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Inception")
}

queries.question: Who produced Inception?
queries.sql: select Full_name from Producer join Movies on Producer.producer_id=Movies.studio_id where Movies.title='Inception'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producers .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?producer p:producer_id ?producer_id_l .
  ?movies p:studio_id ?studio_id_r .
  ?producer p:name ?full_name .
  ?movies p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?producer_id_l) = STR(?studio_id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Inception")
}

queries.question: Who produced Inception?
queries.sql: select name, Full_name  from Studio join Movies on Studio.studio_id=Movies.studio_id  join Producer on Producer.producer_id=Movies.studio_id where Movies.title='Inception'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?producer a :Producers .
  ?producer p:producer_id ?producer_id_l .
  ?movies p:studio_id ?studio_id_r .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?producer p:name ?full_name .
  ?movies p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?producer_id_l) = STR(?studio_id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Inception")
}

queries.question: Display a list of movies and who produced them
queries.sql: select Movies.title, Studio.name from Studio join Movies on Studio.studio_id=Movies.studio_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Display a list of movies and who produced them
queries.sql: select Movies.title, Producer.Full_name  from Producer join Movies on Producer.producer_id=Movies.studio_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?full_name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producers .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?producer p:producer_id ?producer_id_l .
  ?movies p:studio_id ?studio_id_r .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?producer p:name ?full_name .
  FILTER(STR(?producer_id_l) = STR(?studio_id_r))
}

queries.question: Display a list of movies and who produced them
queries.sql: select Movies.title, Studio.name, Producer.Full_name  from Studio join Movies on Studio.studio_id=Movies.studio_id  join Producer on Producer.producer_id=Movies.studio_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?producer a :Producers .
  ?producer p:producer_id ?producer_id_l .
  ?movies p:studio_id ?studio_id_r .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?producer p:name ?full_name .
  FILTER(STR(?producer_id_l) = STR(?studio_id_r))
}
